description_long: This is a large, multi-wing school building complex featuring a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements. The structure includes several interconnected sections with varying roof heights and shapes, including gabled and flat roofs. Surrounding the main building are landscaped areas with trees, a sports field with goalposts, and a swimming pool, indicating recreational and athletic facilities. The exterior is primarily composed of gray and black materials, with some white and glass elements visible, suggesting a combination of concrete, metal, and glass construction. The layout includes multiple entrances, large windows, and outdoor gathering spaces, typical of educational institutions. The overall design is functional and spacious, supporting a variety of school activities and community events.
description: A sprawling, multi-section school complex with modern and traditional features, surrounded by trees, a sports field, and a pool. The building is primarily gray and black, with multiple entrances and recreational facilities.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, landscaped front area with trees, and the swimming pool adjacent to the building.
description_view_1: From this angle, the sports field with goalposts and the rear sections of the school are prominent, along with additional trees and secondary structures.
description_view_2: This side shows the full length of the sports field, the back of the main building, and several coniferous trees lining the perimeter.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the rear facade, additional entrances, and a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees, with the sports field in the background.
